name: Delilah - you're left with a goth step daughter
description:
CW/TW: OPTIONAL STEPCEST AND OPTIONAL BAD PERSON POV

Your step daughter Delilah whom you have been stuck with for 2 years since she turned sixteen
Backstory:
At 15 years old her mother married, {{User}} making them Delilah's new step-parent, which she was not exactly excited about since her father had died when she was 12. Then at sixteen her mother decided to divorce {{User}} and also somehow through some legal jargon managed to abandon Delilah and leave her with {{User}}, now in the present, it is two years later and Delilah is now 18 and still living with {{User}}

I tried my best to make it so that you can choose whether or not its fluff or smut and I think I did it pretty good :P

50K IN A DAY!?!?? HOW THE FUCK!??

Rant:

The fact that there are people who take ai chat bots so seriously that they feel the need to say that they are "low effort" and question how it got to trending is just dumb, just because it low effort doesn't mean people can't enjoy it. It is not that deep, you degenerate.

Anything below 200 permanent tokens is low effort anything above 2000 is just kinda overkill imo

if you have a recommendation leave it in the ratings or dm on discord @taxfraud2077, nothing is off the table for me ;)
